'''鈭歴-y-dh-zh''' ('''kasaydhezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:film|film]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:film|film]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-y-dh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kasaydhezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisaydhezhoko|thisaydhezhoko]] || [[word:jisaydhezhoko|jisaydhezhoko]] || [[word:shisaydhezhoko|shisaydhezhoko]] || [[word:kisaydhezhoko|kisaydhezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
